company.name: BioMeasure Technologies
company.description: Sensor prototype for biomarker detection - early stage with limited clinical validation data and undefined regulatory pathway

analysis_request.context: Series A extension evaluation - technology unproven in clinical setting, commercialization pathway undefined
analysis_request.vc_opinion: BioMeasure's sensor concept is interesting but validation is incomplete. Three critical gaps make this a high-risk investment: First, FDA pathway is completely undefined - they haven't conducted a pre-submission meeting and don't know if their device will be Class II or III. That alone could delay approval 2-5 years. Second, clinical validation is only 50% designed - no active enrollment, no timeline for data readout. Third, unit economics are unknown - they don't have a manufacturing cost target or pricing model. They're essentially asking us to fund clinical validation AND regulatory pathway definition simultaneously. This isn't a near-term commercialization play.
